chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Ist Civil Appeal No. D – 21 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection No.2 at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.721/2022 (Stay) 13-10-2022 Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Khokhar, Advocate for the appellant along with appellant Dhani Bux Malano..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the appellant, under instructions, does not press instant appeal, which stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
